function solve(prices, strategy, k) {

    const n = prices.length;

    let original_profit = 0;

    for (let i=0; i < n; i++) {

        original_profit += strategy[i] * prices[i];

    }

    // 预处理prefix_strategy和prefix_prices

    const prefix_strategy = new Array(n+1).fill(0);

    const prefix_prices = new Array(n+1).fill(0);

    for (let i=0; i < n; i++) {

        prefix_strategy[i+1] = prefix_strategy[i] + strategy[i] * prices[i];

        prefix_prices[i+1] = prefix_prices[i] + prices[i];

    }

    let max_delta = -Infinity;

    const half = k / 2;

    for (let i=0; i <= n -k; i++) {

        const end = i +k;

        const original_sub_profit = prefix_strategy[end] - prefix_strategy[i];

        const start_after = i + half;

        const sum_after_prices = prefix_prices[end] - prefix_prices[start_after];

        const delta = sum_after_prices - original_sub_profit;

        if (delta > max_delta) {

            max_delta = delta;

        }

    }

    // 最终结果是 original_profit + max( max_delta, 0 )

    return original_profit + Math.max(max_delta, 0);

}
